core_principles: Pure monochrome elegance: White background, black text, sharp 1px borders.
Classic Print Aesthetic: No rounded corners, no drop shadows. Brutalist editorial layout.
Typographic Focus: Typewriter/monospaced fonts drive the visual hierarchy.
One Accent: Use Vermillion Red strictly for urgent actions, active states, or subtle highlights.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Swiss Grid / Print Ledger. Elements are divided by strict 1px solid black lines.

container_styles.card: bg-white border border-black p-6 rounded-none shadow-none
container_styles.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-black bg-white flex flex-col
container_styles.header: h-16 border-b border-black bg-white flex items-center px-6

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-[#FF3333] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold border border-black
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 rounded-none px-6 py-3 border border-black

inputs.default: border-black rounded-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-black focus-visible:ring-offset-0 bg-white font-mono

data_tables.header: border-b border-black py-3 px-4 uppercase text-xs font-sans tracking-widest text-[#555555]

motion.philosophy: Snappy, crisp, zero easing delays for most elements, except the standout Typewriter AI quote effect.

typewriter_effect.description: Crucial requirement for Mental Health AI Quotes. Characters must appear sequentially to mimic a classic typewriter.

framer_motion_implementation.container: initial='hidden' animate='visible' variants={{ visible: { transition: { staggerChildren: 0.05 } } }}
framer_motion_implementation.child: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 5 }, visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0 } }}

motion.hover: Instant color invert or sharp accent shift. No soft fades.

modules.dashboard_shell: Left sidebar with monospace navigation links. Active link gets a solid black background or left 4px Vermillion border. Main content area with top border header.
modules.waste_exchange: Listings with stark black/white photography (if possible) or heavy typographic emphasis. Search bar full width with thick border.
modules.water_tracker: Minimalist charts (Recharts). Black lines, no area fills. Data displayed like a scientific ledger.
modules.tax_helper: Spreadsheet aesthetic. Dense, clear, mono-spaced numbers. Export buttons (PDF/Excel) prominent.
modules.currency_converter: Oversized typography for exchange rates. Input fields that look like blank spaces on a printed form.
modules.mental_health_journal: Distraction-free writing zone. The AI quote section should have an off-white background with the typewriter animation driving the experience.
modules.skill_swap: Grid of profile cards. 'Name' and 'Skill' in bold typewriter font. Ratings shown in simple asterisks (*) instead of yellow stars for classic feel.

media.image_strategy: Minimalist, editorial, highly structural, often black and white or muted tones. Strong shadows.

hero_dashboard_empty.description: Minimalist architecture shadow white, used for empty states or generic module backgrounds.

water_module.description: Three clear drinking glasses, used as a subtle visual for the Water Usage Tracker.

mental_health_journal.description: Typewriter and notepad, setting the mood for the mental health micro-journal.

tax_business_module.description: Calculator and desk, minimalist shot for the Tax Helper module.

general_texture.description: Blank white texture with shadows, can be used for subtle background visual interest.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add `@fontsource/courier-prime` and `@fontsource/geist` (or standard Inter) in the project.
Enforce `rounded-none` on all Shadcn components. Remove default radius.
Set the Tailwind config to use Courier Prime as the sans/mono default.
Apply strict `border-black` classes on wrappers. Aim for a 'Print Ledger' UI feel.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
